subcodes.first_line: Glory be unto Thee, O Thou Lord of all being and Possessor of all things visible and invisible! I beseech Thee by Thy Most Great Prison, by that which hath befallen Thee
subcodes.first_line_orig: سبحانک یا اله الوجود و مالک الغیب و الشهود اسئلک بسجنک الاعظم و بما ورد علیک
subcodes.subjects: @prayer for specific individuals; groups, @suffering and imprisonment, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God, @transcendence; unknowability of God
